description: Style Note adidas helps you avoid discomfort and keep dry and comfortable all day long. These T-shirts also offer you a stylish look that is most flattering on your day off. Pair it with a pair of jeans and sports shoes on your day off. Product Details Black T-shirt, has round neckline, short sleeves with Adidas patented three stripes, branding at the back below the neckline and graphic print in front Material and Care 70% cotton and 30% polyester Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
